title: deinbollia pynaertii var. pynaertii
intro: Deinbollia pynaertii var. pynaertii is a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae, commonly known as the Burseraceae family. It is a shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa, particularly in the Democratic Republic of Congo and other parts of Central Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Deinbollia pynaertii var. pynaertii include treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions, and it is also used to prepare herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments.
